---
title: "Celigo_Well_Level_Plots"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r print-platemap-conditions-labelled}
Condition <- read.csv("Example_Conditions.csv", check.names = FALSE)

Condition$Condition <- gsub("\\\\n", "\n", Condition$Condition)
p<-plate_plot(
  data = Condition,
  position = Well,
  value = Condition,
  plate_size = 96,
  plate_type = "round",
    title = "Supernatant Platemap", 
  label = Condition,
  show_legend = FALSE,
  label_size = 1.1 ,
  title_size = 11,
  colour = c("#3CB371", "#6495ED", "#8A2BE2", "#EDC764", "#2BE28A", "#48D1CC",  "#BA55D3", "#D1484D", "#B33C47", "#CC7A33", "#66A9AB", "#5A8AC9", "#99CC66", "#CC6699", "#669C94", "#B35A66", "#9B84B3", "#CC7266"),
  scale = 1.4  ,
  legend_n_row = 5
)

    ggsave("Timepoint_Assay.png", plot = p, width = 6, height = 4)
    
    plot(p)
```

```{r print-heat-map-labelled}
p<-plate_plot(
  data = NET_Data_Combined,
  title = "Run 9 MPO Area Gate %",
  position = Well,
  value = Fraction.Gated,
  label = Condition,
  label_size = 1.3, 
  scale = 1.0,
  plate_size = 24,
  plate_type = "round",
  show_legend = TRUE,
) +
    labs(fill = "") 

ggsave("net9_special1.pdf", plot = p, width = 4, height = 3)
print(p)
```

```{r print-multiple-platemaps}

all_cols <- colnames(NET_Data)[7:43]
columns_to_plot <- all_cols[all_cols != "Condition"]

for(col_name in columns_to_plot) {
  clean_title <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9%_ ]", " ", col_name)
  p <- plate_plot(
    data = NET_Data,
    title = paste("Run 8" , clean_title),
    title_size = 12,
    position = Well,
    value = !!sym(col_name),
    label = Condition,
    label_size = 1.7,
    scale = 1.2 ,
    plate_size = 24,
    plate_type = "round",
    show_legend = TRUE
  ) +
    labs(fill = "") 
  
clean_file <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_ ]", "_", col_name)
    ggsave(paste0("platemap_", clean_file, ".pdf"), plot = p, width = 6, height = 4)
  
  plot(p)
}

```

```{r lump-condition-symbol-PMA}
# Define runs, conditions, and measures to plot
runs_to_plot <- c("Run 6")
conditions_to_plot <- c("Cells Only", "Cells Only\n+ PMA", "MPs 2 Hour", "MPs 2 Hour\n+ PMA")
measure_to_plot <- "CitH3.Index"
controls_to_plot <-c("- PMA", "+ PMA")

# Prepare the data
plot_data <- NET_Data_Combined %>%
  
   filter(Source %in% runs_to_plot) %>%
  select(Well, Condition, Source, all_of(measure_to_plot)) %>%
  rename(value = all_of(measure_to_plot)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
  mutate(Base_Condition = gsub("\\n\\+ PMA|\\+ PMA", "", Condition),
         PMA_Status = if_else(grepl("PMA", Condition), "+ PMA", "- PMA")) %>%
  filter(Base_Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "MPs\n2 Hour")) %>%
  mutate(Base_Condition = factor(Base_Condition, levels = c("Cells Only", "MPs\n2 Hour")),
         Source = factor(Source))

base_condition <- c("Cells Only", "MPs\n2 Hour")

unique_PMA <- unique(plot_data$PMA_Status)

# Get unique source names from your filtered data, extract numbers, and make #-#-# string
unique_sources <- unique(plot_data$Source)
run_numbers <- sort(as.numeric(gsub("Run ", "", unique_sources))) 
run_string <- paste(run_numbers, collapse = "&")

# Mixed-effects model analysis
mixed_model <- lmer(value ~ Base_Condition + (1|PMA_Status), data = plot_data)
model_summary <- summary(mixed_model)

# Extract p-value from the model
row_index <- grep("Condition", rownames(model_summary$coefficients))
p_value <- round(model_summary$coefficients[row_index, "Pr(>|t|)"], 3)

# Extract effect size (difference between conditions)
condition_effect <- round(model_summary$coefficients[2, "Estimate"], 4)

# Wrap title
wrapped_title <- str_wrap(paste("Runs", run_string, measure_to_plot, "(Mixed-Effects ANOVA)"), width = 25)
wrapped_title <- gsub("\\.", " ", wrapped_title)

# Fix y-axis
label_y <- gsub("\\.", " ", measure_to_plot)

# Create shape values (cycle through shape numbers if you have more than 3)
  shape_values <- c(16, 17, 15, 18, 19)[1:length(unique_PMA)]
  names(shape_values) <- unique_PMA


# Column colors
  get_color <- function(col_name) {
   if (grepl("MPO", col_name)) {
    return("green")
  } else if (grepl("CitH3", col_name)) {
    return("red")
  } else if (grepl("DAPI", col_name)) {
    return("blue")
  } else if (grepl("Bright.Field", col_name)) {
    return("grey")
  } else {
    return("black")
  }
}
  
# Create the boxplot
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Base_Condition, y = value,)) +
  
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, width = 0.6, fill = get_color(measure_to_plot)) +
  
  # Add individual data points with different shapes for each Source
  geom_point(aes(shape = PMA_Status),
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2),
             size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +

# Use in the plot
scale_shape_manual(values = shape_values,
                   name = "") +
  
  # Add comparison bracket (visual only)
  geom_signif(comparisons = list(base_condition),
              annotations = "", 
              textsize = 0) +
  
  # Add mixed-effects p-value annotation
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = max(plot_data$value) * 1.15, 
           label = paste("p =", p_value), size = 4) +
  
  # Add effect size annotation
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = max(plot_data$value) * 1.05, 
           label = paste("Effect Size =", condition_effect), size = 3, color = "gray50") +
  
  # Formatting
  labs(x = "", 
       y = label_y, 
       title = wrapped_title) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "right")

# Print the plot
print(p)
ggsave("MPs_2hr.time_plus-minus_PMA.pdf", plot = p, width = 4, height = 6 )
```
